_comment: Blank-core infra template. The DOMAIN (goal, metric, connector impl, actions) lives in the pack, not here. When you drop in a domain pack, use ITS config.json (which adds connector params + domain paths + a recommended allow_list). Edit provider keys via .env.
_git_comment: OPTIONAL git versioning of the materialized artifacts. Disabled unless enabled=true. repo_dir MUST be a PRE-INITIALIZED git repo rooted exactly there (run `git init` yourself) and MUST NOT be the project's source repo. granularity: per_run|per_action. Leave remote empty for local-only; set it (e.g. origin) to also push. Command-line variant (uses your existing git auth).
